message:
Improve research result file marker

Use a return arrow for the saved research report path so the summary no longer resembles an expandable disclosure control.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+---
+title: Clearer web research file marker
+type: bugfix
+author: mavam
+created: 2026-04-25T19:00:14.263026Z
+---
+
+Web research result summaries now use a less visually distracting marker for the saved report path. The file location remains visible after a research job completes, but no longer appears with an arrow that suggests an expandable disclosure control.
